query: renewable energy news headline Reuters renewable energy 2025
answer: Renewable energy capacity reached nearly 50% of global electricity in 2025, driven by significant solar growth. Despite market shocks from fossil fuel investments, countries with high renewable capacity remained resilient. This shift highlights the global transition towards sustainable energy sources.

results.title: Renewables grew to almost 50% of global electricity capacity in 2025 after solar boost  | Reuters Best
results.snippet: # Renewables grew to almost 50% of global electricity capacity in 2025 after solar boost. FILE PHOTO: Solar panels sit on the roof of a residential property in view of the Sydney Harbour Bridge in Sydney, Australia, March 30, 2026. Renewable power made up almost 50% of the world’s electricity capacity last year after a record increase in solar installations, data from the International Renewable Energy Agency shared exclusively with Reuters showed. As the Middle Eastern conflict has led to record monthly gains on oil markets, some in industry have lobbied for more investment in fossil fuels, but countries with higher renewable capacity have been insulated from the market shock, some analysts say. 22 April 2026 Exclusives | Global Read more. ### Anthropic weighs building its own AI chips, sources say. 10 April 2026 Exclusives | Global Read more. ### BP in active talks with Stonepeak over Castrol sale, sources say. Thyssenkrupp, Jindal steel sale talks falter on pension, energy costs, sources say.
